name: agent-bridge
description: Bridge AI coding agents across machines via SSH. Tools-only MCP server (bridge_send_message, bridge_receive_messages, bridge_run_command, bridge_status, bridge_list_machines, bridge_clear_inbox, bridge_inbox_stats). Pair with the agent-bridge-channel plugin for inbound channel push. Companion to the bash `agent-bridge` CLI used for pairing and SSH transport.
